name: HAL Kiosk
description: Channel plugin for HAL voice assistant kiosk — routes voice commands through an OpenClaw agent and delivers responses back to the kiosk for TTS and display.

halBaseUrl.description: HAL server base URL, e.g. http://your-hal-host:8765

halApiKey.description: Optional shared secret for webhook authentication

dmPolicy.description: DM security policy (open for LAN trust)

allowFrom.description: Allowed sender IDs when dmPolicy is allowlist
